dependency_changes: Added high-specificity .forum_root overrides for generic selectors affected by app/globals.css (.btn/.tag/.item/.glass/.neon and semantic containers).
detected_risks: Potential minor visual deltas in non-forum overlays that rely on global .btn look
notes: Validated conflict source in app/globals.css generic .btn and global section/header/article selectors with !important
Forum style content still sourced from baseline Forum.jsx and kept intact; isolation overrides appended as a boundary layer
